page.content: The table presents data on various isolates characterized by the headers Isolate ID (genotypic group), Fish part from where isolated, rfb O1, Cytotoxic effect (survival of HeLa cells), and Mean FA index (V/L)*. The isolate F-32b (I), taken from the outer surface, showed a positive rfb O1 result, was cytotoxic with a survival rate of HeLa cells between 10–30%, and had a Mean FA index of 1.78 (1). The isolate F-36a (VII), sourced from the gill, exhibited a positive rfb O1 result, was non-cytotoxic with a survival rate exceeding 90%, and recorded a Mean FA index of 0.46 (3). Isolate F-44 (VIII), derived from the gut, also showed a positive rfb O1 result, was cytotoxic with less than 1% survival of HeLa cells, and had a Mean FA index of 1.29 (1).

isolated, rfb O1, Cytotoxic effect (survival of HeLa cells), and Mean FA index (V/L)*. The isolate F-32b (I), taken from the
outer surface, showed a positive rfb O1 result, was cytotoxic with a survival rate of HeLa cells between 10–30%, and had a
Mean FA index of 1.78 (1). The isolate F-36a (VII), sourced from the gill, exhibited a positive rfb O1 result, was non-cytotoxic
with a survival rate exceeding 90%, and recorded a Mean FA index of 0.46 (3). Isolate F-44 (VIII), derived from the gut, also

page.content: The isolate F-45 (IX), from the gill, was positive for rfb O1, cytotoxic with survival rates below 40%, and had a Mean FA index of 0.67 (3). Isolate F-47 (XXIII), obtained from storage ice, was negative for rfb O1, non-cytotoxic with survival rates above 95%, and had a Mean FA index of 0.87 (2). The isolate F-49d (XIX), also from storage ice, was negative for rfb O1, cytotoxic with a survival rate between 20–50%, and recorded a Mean FA index of 0.53 (1). Isolate F-52a (XXVI), taken from the rectum, was negative for rfb O1, cytotoxic with less than 1% survival, and had a Mean FA index of 1.44 (1). The isolate F-53 (IX), from the outer surface, showed a positive rfb O1 result, was non-cytotoxic with survival rates above 95%, and had a Mean FA index of 1.73 (1). Lastly, F-91b (VIII), also from the outer surface, was positive for rfb O1, cytotoxic with less than 1% survival of HeLa cells, and recorded a Mean FA index of 1.25 (1).
